description: Slack bot/user/app-level/config tokens, workflow tokens, webhook URLs, and workspace red flags. Some token formats are already detected by the broader secret-detection skill; this file adds Slack-specific misconfigs and admin signals.

token_patterns.name: Slack Config-Access Token
token_patterns.notes: Config-access tokens can mutate Slack app manifests org-wide.

misconfigurations.title: New channels default to public; sensitive workspaces should default to private
misconfigurations.rationale: Public-by-default in workspaces handling customer data leads to over-sharing.
misconfigurations.fix: Org settings > Channels > new-channel-default = private for security/legal/finance workspaces.

misconfigurations.title: Slack Connect external shared channels allowed without admin approval
misconfigurations.rationale: Externally-shared channels are a documented exfiltration vector.
misconfigurations.fix: Org admin > Slack Connect > require admin approval for accepting/inviting external orgs.

misconfigurations.title: Service uses an Incoming Webhook URL where a signed Bot App would be appropriate
misconfigurations.rationale: Webhooks have no scope; they can post to any channel they were created for, and they cannot be granularly revoked without losing all integrations.
misconfigurations.fix: Migrate to a Slack App with `chat:write.channel` scope + bot-token; signed; revocable.

misconfigurations.title: Event handler does not verify `X-Slack-Signature` + `X-Slack-Request-Timestamp`
misconfigurations.rationale: Without signature verification, any internet host can spoof Slack events.
misconfigurations.fix: Compute v0 signature: `'v0:' + ts + ':' + body` HMAC-SHA256 with signing secret; reject if timestamp drift > 5 min.

misconfigurations.title: MFA not required at the workspace / org level
misconfigurations.rationale: Workspace admin ATO leads directly to DM/channel exfil.
misconfigurations.fix: Org settings > Authentication > require 2FA for all members (and admins).

admin_red_flags.title: Workspace export of public channels / corporate export of all messages
admin_red_flags.rationale: Discovery / Discovery API access dumps full message history.
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: `export_started` or Discovery API token usage outside the IT-managed pipeline.

admin_red_flags.title: New Slack app installed with `chat:write` + `files:read` + `users:read.email`
admin_red_flags.rationale: Combination is the standard 'exfil bot' shape.
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: `app_installed` with scopes superset of the watchlist.

admin_red_flags.title: User promoted to Org Owner / Workspace Owner
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: `role_change` to owner outside scheduled changes.

admin_red_flags.title: Bulk creation of public file share links
admin_red_flags.rationale: Public file links leak code, credentials, customer docs.
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: `file_public_url_created` count per user > 10 in 1h.
